# SwiftLoop

> SwiftLoop is a web design, web development and AI workflow automation studio based in Dubai, UAE. We build award-calibre, conversion-focused websites — including luxury and jewelry e-commerce — and connect them to AI systems and automations that run the business behind the scenes.

## What SwiftLoop does
- **Web design & development (Dubai):** custom marketing sites, e-commerce, and product UI built with Next.js, WebGL and headless CMS, engineered for speed and Core Web Vitals.
- **Luxury & jewelry website creation:** bilingual (English/Arabic) luxury e-commerce for jewelry, watches and premium brands, with AI-assisted inventory.
- **AI workflow automation:** replacing repetitive operations (leads, invoices, reports, follow-ups) with self-running pipelines.
- **AI agents & assistants:** RAG chat, support and voice agents trained on a client's knowledge base.
- **Brand, motion & 3D:** identity systems and interactive Three.js / GSAP experiences.

## Location & contact
- Based in Dubai, United Arab Emirates. Serves Dubai, UAE and remote clients worldwide.
- WhatsApp: +971 50 972 5199
- Email: info@swiftloop.tech
- Website: https://swiftloop.tech

## Pricing (typical)
- One-time website builds typically range AED 4,000–7,000 depending on scope.
- Ongoing monthly retainers available for design + automation upkeep.
- Referral offer: one month free for successful referrals.

## How we work (the loop)
1. **Map** — audit the funnel and operations.
2. **Design** — prototype interface, motion and message in-browser; test with users.
3. **Automate** — deploy AI agents and integrations behind the site.
4. **Iterate** — report on results and tune design and prompts monthly.

## Selected work
- Velora Fine Jewelry — luxury jewelry e-commerce (EN/AR)
- Falcon Timepieces — luxury watch e-commerce, Dubai
- Mainspring — e-commerce, Dubai
- ESM EYWR — e-commerce (Montreal / Dubai)
- BRRN BARRE — website + booking, Dubai
- Creative Finishings — website, Dubai
